stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

By the time the storm reached the coast, the evacuation crews ______ all of the elderly residents from the seaside neighborhoods.
explanation: Two past events: the evacuation happened BEFORE the storm arrived. Use past perfect 'had already moved' for the earlier action.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

Archaeologists excavating the site in 1987 discovered pottery fragments, tools, and what ______ to be a ceremonial altar.
explanation: The main clause is in past tense ('discovered'). Match with past tense 'appeared.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

Since 2018, the nonprofit ______ over ten thousand meals to families in need.
explanation: 'Since 2018' is a present-perfect signal. Use 'has delivered' for a past action continuing into the present.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

Yesterday, the governor ______ a new environmental bill into law.
explanation: 'Yesterday' is a specific past time. Use simple past 'signed,' not present perfect.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

When I arrived at the station, the train ______ already.
explanation: Two past events: the train left BEFORE I arrived. Use past perfect for the earlier one.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The committee ______ for two hours before reaching a decision.
explanation: The meeting occurred for a duration BEFORE a second past event (reaching the decision). Past perfect progressive 'had been meeting.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

Currently, scientists ______ several new species in the rainforest every year.
explanation: 'Currently' signals the present. Use simple present 'discover.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

She ______ in Paris for three years before moving to Rome in 2015.
explanation: The living happened BEFORE the move to Rome. Past perfect 'had lived.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

Water ______ at 100 degrees Celsius at standard atmospheric pressure.
explanation: Scientific fact — use simple present 'boils.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The reporter asked several questions, and the mayor ______ each one carefully.
explanation: Main clause is past tense ('asked'). Use past 'answered.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

Until last year, the library ______ closed on Sundays.
explanation: 'Until last year' signals a past state that ended at a specific past time. Past perfect 'had been' works here.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

Next summer, the family ______ to visit their relatives in Brazil.
explanation: 'Next summer' signals a future plan stated in the present. Use 'plans.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The contract ______ by all parties last Monday.
explanation: 'Last Monday' is a specific past time. Simple past passive 'was signed.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

For the past decade, researchers ______ the long-term effects of the medication on older adults.
explanation: 'For the past decade' is a present-perfect signal — an action starting in the past and continuing to now. 'Have studied.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

By the end of this year, the charity ______ all of its fundraising goals.
explanation: Future perfect: 'by the end of this year' signals a future time by which the action will be complete. 'Will have met.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

In the 1960s, the company ______ its first international branch.
explanation: 'In the 1960s' is a specific past time. Simple past 'opened.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

We ______ to the movie tonight because the theater is hosting a special screening.
explanation: Present progressive 'are going' for a planned future action.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

The patient ______ in the hospital for three days when the test results finally came back.
explanation: Past perfect for the earlier duration: the patient had been in the hospital before the results came back.

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

Shakespeare ______ at least thirty-seven plays during his lifetime.
explanation: A completed action in a historically closed period. Simple past 'wrote.'

stem:
Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?

Before the meeting started, the secretary ______ copies of the agenda.
explanation: The distribution occurred BEFORE the meeting started. Past perfect 'had distributed.'
